name: Creamy Sweet Potato Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Steam sweet potatoes until just tender. Peel and cut into 1/2 inch pieces.
2. Cut each dried apricot half into 8 or 10 pieces.
3. Put sweet potato, apricot pieces, raisins, and cranberries into a medium-sized bowl.
4. Preheat oven to 375 degrees F. Coat a 4-cup casserole dish with non-stick cooking spray.
5. In a small saucepan, heat soymilk to steaming. Reduce heat to low.
6. Remove several tablespoons of hot milk and mix in the rice flour. Stir rice flour paste into soymilk.
7. Cook, stirring constantly, until sauce thickens enough to coat the back of a spoon.
8. Fold sauce into potato and fruit mixture. Spoon into prepared casserole dish.
9. Bake for 30 minutes.
Makes: 2 servings
